tasks.title: Implement test folder structure
tasks.description: Implement flat/type-based test folder structure with organized subdirectories for plans, screenshots, and reports. Use {page}-{action} naming convention.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/ directory at project root (consuming projects)
tests/plans/ subdirectory for plan JSON files
tests/screenshots/ subdirectory for error screenshots
tests/reports/ subdirectory for test reports
File naming convention documented: {page}-{action}.spec.js, {page}-{action}-plan.json, {page}-{action}-report.md
Example: members-create.spec.js, plans/members-create-plan.json, reports/members-create-report.md
Documentation updated to show structure

tasks.title: Remove legacy directory and backup old auth.js
tasks.description: Remove .playwright-test-mcp/ directory (49MB, completely obsolete). Backup current UI-based auth.js before replacement in Phase 2.
acceptanceCriteria: .playwright-test-mcp/ directory removed completely (was 49MB with node_modules)
Current templates/helpers/auth.js backed up to templates/helpers/auth.js.OLD
No code references .playwright-test-mcp/ or log-in-helper/ paths
Grep verification shows no .playwright-test-mcp references
Backup includes note about UI-based vs API-based differences

tasks.title: Update package.json metadata
tasks.description: BREAKING CHANGE: Update package.json to version 1.0.0 (major version bump due to removed login() function). Verify dependencies list, update scripts if needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Version updated to 1.0.0 in package.json (MAJOR version bump)
Dependencies list matches implementation (axios, tough-cookie, http-cookie-agent, otplib, jsonwebtoken, dotenv)
devDependencies correct if any added
Scripts updated if new commands needed
Description updated to mention API-based auth
Keywords updated (add: api, cognito, jwt, sso, fixtures)
peerDependencies includes @playwright/test ^1.40.0

tasks.title: Create artifact cleanup scripts
tasks.description: Create script to clean old plan, screenshot, and report files for test maintenance.
acceptanceCriteria: Cleanup script created (e.g., scripts/cleanup-artifacts.js or npm script)
Can delete old files from tests/plans/
Can delete old files from tests/screenshots/
Can delete old files from tests/reports/
Supports age-based deletion (e.g., older than 30 days)
Supports dry-run mode
Script documented in README

tasks.title: Implement auth.js replacement strategy
tasks.description: BREAKING CHANGE: Replace current UI-based auth.js (569 lines) with new API-based orchestrator. Old login() function will be REMOVED completely. This is version 1.0.0.
acceptanceCriteria: New templates/helpers/auth.js created as orchestrator module
Imports from: auth-cognito.js, auth-sso-login.js, auth-token-cache.js, fund-api.js, member-api.js, data-factory.js
Primary export is setupTest() function (replaces login)
Re-exports utility functions: getCognitoToken, loginToSSO, createFund, createMember, etc.
Keeps navigateToPage() function from old implementation
Keeps generateTOTP() function from old implementation
OLD login() function REMOVED completely (no deprecation period)
Update templates/tests/discover-page.test.js to use setupTest()
File is clean orchestrator (<200 lines)
No UI-based authentication code remains

tasks.title: Create migration script and guide
tasks.description: BREAKING CHANGE (v1.0.0): Create migration guide for users upgrading from v0.2.x (UI-based login) to v1.0.0 (API-based setupTest). Old login() function no longer exists.
acceptanceCriteria: MIGRATION.md guide created with clear BREAKING CHANGE notice
Guide states this is version 1.0.0 (major version bump)
Before/after code examples (login → setupTest)
Documents removed function: login() - NO LONGER AVAILABLE
Documents new function: setupTest() - REQUIRED for all tests
Guide documents new .env variables needed (COGNITO_URL, SSO_URL, TOTP_SECRET, etc.)
Guide documents benefits (5x faster, auto fixtures, caching)
Optional: scripts/migrate-to-api-auth.js helper script
Script can scan test files for login() usage and report errors
Script can suggest setupTest() conversions
Script provides .env migration checklist
Guide includes troubleshooting section
Guide includes rollback instructions (downgrade to 0.2.x if needed)
Guide linked from README.md with prominent warning
CHANGELOG.md updated with BREAKING CHANGES section

tasks.title: Update verify-setup.js for new requirements
tasks.description: Update verify-setup.js to check for new dependencies (axios, tough-cookie, etc.) and new .env variables (COGNITO_URL, SSO_URL, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: Checks for axios package installed
Checks for tough-cookie package installed
Checks for http-cookie-agent package installed
Checks for jsonwebtoken package installed
Checks for dotenv package installed
Validates .env has COGNITO_URL field
Validates .env has COGNITO_CLIENT_ID field
Validates .env has SSO_URL field
Validates .env has SF360_SERVER_URL field
Updates error messages for missing packages
Provides install commands for missing packages
Backward compatible with old .env format (graceful warnings)
Clear differentiation between old vs new setup
